languages.text: Grenades deal additional shock damage equal to +10% of the inflicted damage multiplied by {uip|FerrumSanctumStacks|2ba2e432183f492bb9cdf9cc063305ce}.

traits.locale_text: Grenades deal additional shock damage equal to +10% of the inflicted damage multiplied by {uip|FerrumSanctumStacks|2ba2e432183f492bb9cdf9cc063305ce}.

languages.text: Бросая гранату, персонаж наносит дополнительный {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрический урон{/g}, равный <u>(10% урона гранаты × число уровней {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g})</u>.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: Бросая гранату, персонаж наносит дополнительный {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрический урон{/g}, равный <u>(10% урона гранаты × число уровней {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}феррум санктум{/g})</u>.

languages.original_text: Grenades deal additional shock damage equal to +10% of the inflicted damage multiplied by {uip|FerrumSanctumStacks|2ba2e432183f492bb9cdf9cc063305ce}.

traits.locale_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional shock damage equal to 10% of the damage dealt by the grenade multiplied by the number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}.

Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.
Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional shock damage equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g}</u>.

languages.text: Setzt der Nutzer eine Granate ein, verursacht er zusätzlichen {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} in Höhe von <u>(10 % Granatenschaden × Zahl der {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum-sanctum{/g}-Stapel)</u>.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: Setzt der Nutzer eine Granate ein, verursacht er zusätzlichen {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} in Höhe von <u>(10 % Granatenschaden × Zahl der {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum-sanctum{/g}-Stapel)</u>.

languages.text: Cada vez que el usuario lanza una granada, inflige {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} adicional igual a <u>(10 % del daño de la granada × número de acumulaciones de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que el usuario lanza una granada, inflige {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} adicional igual a <u>(10 % del daño de la granada × número de acumulaciones de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, her bomba kullandığında <u>(%10 bomba hasarı × {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi sayısı)</u> kadar ilave {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, her bomba kullandığında <u>(%10 bomba hasarı × {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi sayısı)</u> kadar ilave {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir.

languages.text: 使用者使用手雷攻击时，额外造成<u>（10%的手雷伤害×{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}层数）</u>点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: 使用者使用手雷攻击时，额外造成<u>（10%的手雷伤害×{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}层数）</u>点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。

languages.text: Lorsque l'utilisateur lance une grenade, il inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} supplémentaires équivalents à <u>(10 % des dégâts de grenade × nombre de cumuls de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g})</u>.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque l'utilisateur lance une grenade, il inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} supplémentaires équivalents à <u>(10 % des dégâts de grenade × nombre de cumuls de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g})</u>.

languages.text: 使用者がグレネードを使用するたびに、<u>(グレネードダメージの10% × {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}のスタック数</u>に等しい追加の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与える。
languages.original_text: Whenever the user uses a grenade, they deal additional {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} equal to <u>(10% grenade damage × number of stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g})</u>.

traits.locale_text: 使用者がグレネードを使用するたびに、<u>(グレネードダメージの10% × {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}のスタック数</u>に等しい追加の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与える。
